title: Apex Instruments launches next-generation predictive maintenance suite
headline: Apex Instruments launches next-generation predictive maintenance suite
summary: The launch expands Apex's asset monitoring platform and is expected to be available to customers in the third quarter.
raw_text: Apex Instruments said its new predictive maintenance suite combines edge sensors, workflow software, and anomaly detection dashboards aimed at factory uptime improvement. The company expects pilot deployments to begin with existing industrial customers later this quarter.
